# Luke Libby

> Creative Technologist and Product Builder

Portfolio of product stories, design systems, and shipped work by Luke Libby — AI workflows, internal tools, and digital systems.

- Contact: https://lukelibby.com/contact
- Resume PDF: https://lukelibby.com/resume.pdf
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/luke-libby1/

## Site
- [Home](https://lukelibby.com/): Luke Libby — Creative Technologist and Product Builder. AI workflows, internal tools, and digital systems.
- [Work](https://lukelibby.com/work): Product stories, brand systems, UI explorations, and shipped work by Luke Libby.
- [Resume](https://lukelibby.com/resume): Resume and experience for Luke Libby — Creative Technologist, Product Builder, and Technical Content Producer.
- [Contact](https://lukelibby.com/contact): Contact Luke Libby for consulting, collaborations, and product development work.

## Product Stories
- [WyldTracks](https://lukelibby.com/stories/wyldtracks): Private-alpha AI wildlife field journal with evidence-backed IDs, GBIF validation, and a personal observation journal.
- [AI-Assisted Hands-On Production Workflow](https://lukelibby.com/stories/ai-lab-production): An anonymized product story on using AI inside the workflow for hands-on technical learning content, creation, review, and production.
- [Secure Presentation Workflow Add-in](https://lukelibby.com/stories/presentation-builder): An anonymized product story on turning messy PowerPoint workflows into structured, AI-ready slide data through a custom JSON schema.
- [Play It Pro](https://lukelibby.com/stories/play-it-pro): A music education platform for teachers, students, and tutorial authors with structured lessons, learning paths, and a curated tutorial library.
- [Skatespot Discovery App](https://lukelibby.com/stories/skatespot): Spot-first skate discovery concept with map, clips, co-signs, and saved lists tied to real locations.

## Brand & Interface Systems
- [Terrapin Outdoors](https://lukelibby.com/brand-systems/terrapin-outdoors): Map-first outdoor platform design system with foundations, map shells, content modules, and field-ready components.
- [Replenish Health](https://lukelibby.com/brand-systems/replenish-health): Dark-mode design system for a health platform with brand pillars, color tokens, typography, iconography, and dashboard UI components.

## Files
- [Resume PDF](https://lukelibby.com/resume.pdf): Downloadable resume for Luke Libby.
